name: Full Security Audit
description: Comprehensive security audit covering all attack surfaces including web, network, API, and infrastructure scanning.

pipeline.name: Reconnaissance
pipeline.description: Discover assets, subdomains, and exposed services

pipeline.name: Vulnerability Scanning
pipeline.description: Scan for known CVEs and common vulnerabilities

pipeline.name: Exploitation Verification
pipeline.description: Verify discovered vulnerabilities with safe exploits

pipeline.name: Analysis & Reporting
pipeline.description: Aggregate findings and generate comprehensive report
